description_long: This object consists of two swords, one larger and one smaller, both sheathed in a single, dark-colored scabbard. The blades are long, straight, and double-edged, with a matte black finish that gives them a modern, tactical appearance. The handles are wrapped in a brown material, possibly leather, and feature subtle metallic accents and a ring pommel at the end for attachment or grip enhancement. The crossguards are simple and functional, providing hand protection without excessive ornamentation. The scabbard is robust and matches the dark tone of the blades, securely holding both swords in place. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, suggesting a focus on practicality and durability.
description: A pair of straight, double-edged swords with brown-wrapped handles and a dark, sturdy scabbard. The design is modern and functional, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The front view shows both swords sheathed together, highlighting the brown-wrapped handles and the robust, dark scabbard.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the slim, straight profile of the blades and the alignment of the handles, with the scabbard mostly hidden.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the scabbard and the handles, showing the attachment rings and the simple crossguards.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the straightness of the blades and the parallel positioning of the swords within the scabbard.
attribute_handle_design: straight, brown-wrapped, ring pommel, subtle metallic accents
